headings.instruction: CRITICAL: Do NOT use Inter, Roboto, or standard sans for headings. Use Playfair Display to establish an editorial, Old Money Tech aesthetic.

body.instruction: Use Manrope for all body copy, UI elements, and admin dashboard data.

scale.h1: text-5xl md:text-7xl lg:text-8xl tracking-tighter leading-[0.9] font-medium

colors.instruction: Monochrome dominance. Color is function only. Use stark contrasts to simulate print editorial layouts. Ensure all text meets APCA contrast guidelines.

surfaces.header: Crystal Glass variant: backdrop-blur-2xl bg-white/70 with a delicate border-b border-black/5. Never use fully transparent header.
surfaces.cards: Flat, sharp edges or max rounded-none. Subtly outlined border-border, no heavy drop shadows. Hover states should feature subtle image zooms or border darkening.
surfaces.modals: Backdrop-blur with semi-transparent dark overlay bg-black/40.

visual_enhancers.borders: 1px crisp lines. Use border-collapse for technical grids in the admin panel.
visual_enhancers.hover_states: Always explicitly define text colors on hover. focus:ring-2 focus:ring-black focus:outline-none.

components.buttons: Sharp rectangular corners. Dark backgrounds with white text for primary actions. Hover must translate slightly (-translate-y-px) and lighten.
components.inputs: Shadcn based. Sharp rectangular, 1px border. Focus state must be a thin black ring.
components.admin_tables: Dense layouts, thin borders, clear hover states on rows. Minimalist, uncluttered.
components.image_containers: Max height constraints on mobile. Overlapping bento layouts. Subtly darkened overlay on hero images if text is overlaid (bg-black/30).
components.tags: Pill-shaped or small rectangles, uppercase, wide letter spacing.

grids_and_layouts.spacing: Generous spacing. Use p-8, p-12, py-24. For admin, use tighter p-4, p-6.
grids_and_layouts.bento_grid: MODE A (Tetris Grid) for Marketing. Col-span-full for hero, mixed col-span-4 and row-span-2 for asymmetrical tension. Never fill 100% of the grid perfectly. MODE B for Admin Dashboard.
grids_and_layouts.alignment: Left align text primarily. Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 for fine control.

motion.instructions: MANDATORY: Use lenis for smooth scrolling to give the site premium momentum. Micro-animations on hover (e.g., image scale up slightly within overflow-hidden container). Staggered entrance animations for product grids. Soft fades and smooth transforms.

media_and_assets.icons: lucide-react with strokeWidth={1} or {1.2} for a delicate, luxury feel.

image_urls.description: Person in a white dress, perfect for homepage hero or lookbook header.
Woman in black blazer, sophisticated, for collection/trending showcase.
Grayscale editorial model for high contrast sections.
Interior of luxury boutique with clothing rack.
Celine store interior for the about or visit store page.
Apparel flatlay, can be used for mock product entries.

media_and_assets.instruction: NEVER use placeholder images. Stick entirely to this curated list or dynamically generate more if explicitly needed.

testing.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Avoid AI slop.
Do not use dark colors as gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy, asymmetrical grids, overlapping images.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (transition: all). Use transition: transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease etc.
You MUST NOT center align the app container (.App { text-align: center; } is FORBIDDEN).
Never use AI assistant Emojis for icons.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui.
For the showcase, the design must feel like a high-end fashion house digital showroom — editorial, aspirational, with strong typography and cinematic imagery.
general_ui_ux_guidelines: Implement clear visual hierarchy with typography scale and generous whitespace.
Ensure all contrast ratios meet WCAG AA standards, preferably APCA.
Mobile-first responsive design is mandatory. Do not hide primary navigation arbitrarily behind hamburgers on desktop.
Ensure forms and interactive components have visible focus states.
Always wrap interactive icons in a button or link with proper aria-labels.
